diagnosis.startDesc: Select a diagnosis type to begin structured analysis.
diagnosis.weeklyReviewDesc: Diagnose this week's operating performance across all channels
diagnosis.campaignRetroDesc: Analyze a specific campaign's target vs actual performance
diagnosis.singleMetricDesc: Deep-dive into a specific metric movement and root causes
diagnosis.phaseNote: Run structured diagnostic tasks that combine data analysis, enterprise knowledge, and AI reasoning. This module will be fully built in Phase 3.
diagnosis.noResults: No diagnosis results yet. Start a new diagnosis above.

agents.selectAgent: Select an agent to start a task.
agents.businessAnalystDesc: Generate weekly business diagnosis from selected time range and data.
agents.weeklyWriterDesc: Transform structured diagnosis into a polished report draft.
agents.taskInputPlaceholder: Describe what you want this agent to do...
agents.selectDiagnosisPlaceholder: Select a completed diagnosis to transform
agents.ba_default_task: Generate weekly business diagnosis for W10 (2025-03-03 ~ 2025-03-09) covering all channels and products. Focus on key anomalies and actionable recommendations.
agents.wr_default_task: Transform the Week 10 diagnosis into a polished weekly report suitable for the operations team meeting.
agents.cr_default_task: Generate a structured retrospective for the Sunscreen Launch campaign (March 2025).

settings.note: System configuration will be expanded as needed. This is a single-tenant demo.
settings.llmConfigDesc: Configure the AI provider used for diagnosis, reports, and agent execution.
settings.llmProviderDesc: Select which LLM backend to use
settings.providerMockDesc: Pre-written responses, no API calls needed
settings.providerLocalDesc: Ollama / vLLM for enterprise private deployment

anomalyData.a1: Douyin conversion rate dropped significantly, possibly due to creative fatigue from influencer assets.
anomalyData.a2: Tmall refund rate increased, likely related to the sunscreen product launch quality feedback.
anomalyData.a3: Ad spend increased ahead of the end-of-month Tmall promotion.

diagnosisData.d1_summary: Overall performance was under pressure this week, mainly due to a decline in Douyin conversion rate and weak payback from the sunscreen launch campaign. Tmall remained stable but refund rate rose. Xiaohongshu showed positive engagement growth.
diagnosisData.d1_h1: Creative fatigue from influencer assets led to weaker post-click conversion on Douyin.
diagnosisData.d1_h2: Sunscreen product texture feedback in reviews caused higher-than-expected Tmall refund rate.
diagnosisData.d1_h3: Low-price competitor attack on serum category may be pulling price-sensitive users.
diagnosisData.d1_risk1: If conversion rate decline continues for two weeks, Douyin ROI may fall below the 1.5 threshold.
diagnosisData.d1_risk2: Rising refund rate on sunscreen could trigger negative review accumulation, impacting organic search ranking.
diagnosisData.d1_risk3: Increased ad spend without conversion improvement will erode overall profitability.
diagnosisData.d1_rec1: Refresh influencer creatives and reduce spend on low-efficiency ad groups on Douyin.
diagnosisData.d1_rec2: Review the sunscreen product detail page and address texture complaints in the description.
diagnosisData.d1_rec3: Launch a limited-time bundle (sunscreen + cleanser) to improve perceived value and AOV.
diagnosisData.d1_rec4: Increase Xiaohongshu content seeding budget given positive engagement trend.
diagnosisData.d1_check1: Verify CTR movement for newly added creatives over the last 7 days.
diagnosisData.d1_check2: Check customer service feedback regarding sunscreen texture complaints.
diagnosisData.d1_check3: Compare competitor pricing for the Brightening Serum category this week.
diagnosisData.d1_check4: Review Xiaohongshu post engagement metrics for top 10 recent posts.
diagnosisData.d2_summary: The sunscreen launch achieved 72% of its first-week GMV target. Traffic acquisition was on track, but conversion was below expectations due to product page issues and customer concerns about texture.
diagnosisData.d2_h1: Product detail page lacks clear texture demonstration and user testimonials.
diagnosisData.d2_h2: Price point at ¥139 faces direct competition from established brands at ¥99-119.
diagnosisData.d2_risk1: Without PDP optimization, Week 2 conversion may drop further as initial curiosity traffic fades.
diagnosisData.d2_risk2: Negative reviews about texture may accumulate and damage long-term organic conversion.
diagnosisData.d2_rec1: Add video demonstration showing lightweight texture and absorption speed to PDP.
diagnosisData.d2_rec2: Create a ¥99 trial-size option to lower the entry barrier for first-time buyers.
diagnosisData.d2_rec3: Proactively reach out to refund customers for feedback and offer replacement samples.
diagnosisData.d2_check1: Get exact refund reason breakdown from customer service team.
diagnosisData.d2_check2: Check if competitor launched any counter-promotions during the same period.
diagnosisData.d3_summary: Douyin conversion rate dropped 18% WoW, primarily driven by creative fatigue in top-performing ad groups and a traffic mix shift toward broader, lower-intent audiences from the influencer expansion campaign.
diagnosisData.d3_h1: Top 3 creatives have been running for 14+ days without refresh, showing clear fatigue signals.
diagnosisData.d3_h2: Mid-March influencer expansion brought broader audience with lower purchase intent.
diagnosisData.d3_h3: Landing page load time increased to 3.2s (from 1.8s) after recent PDP update.
diagnosisData.d3_risk1: Continued creative fatigue could push Douyin CAC above ¥45, making the channel unprofitable.
diagnosisData.d3_risk2: Audience quality dilution from influencer expansion may require 2-3 weeks to correct.
diagnosisData.d3_rec1: Immediately pause the 3 fatigued creatives and deploy 5 new variants.
diagnosisData.d3_rec2: Narrow influencer expansion targeting to exclude low-intent audience segments.
diagnosisData.d3_rec3: Investigate and fix the landing page load time regression.
diagnosisData.d3_rec4: Set up automated creative fatigue alerts at -10% CTR threshold.
diagnosisData.d3_check1: Confirm landing page load time with the engineering team.
diagnosisData.d3_check2: Review audience overlap between organic and paid Douyin traffic.
